items.title: A Look At UnitedHealth Group’s Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
items.description: Recent performance snapshot and company scale UnitedHealth Group (UNH) has seen mixed share performance recently, with an approximate 0.5% decline over the past day, a 3.3% drop over the past week, and a 3.1% gain over the past month. Looking over longer periods, the stock shows an 11.9% decline over the past 3 months, a 15.2% drop year to date, and a 38.9% negative total return over the past year. The 3 year and 5 year total returns are also negative. Against that share price backdrop,...
